title: Recruitment for an Innovation Facilitator
body: "We have a vacancy for an Innovation Facilitator.  Job Title  Innovation Facilitator  Grade  G7  Salary & Pension  £62,000 per annum with Pension Scheme  Annual Leave entitlement  Commencing at 25 days  Role  The role will support delivery of the VMD Science Strategy and help ensure that our scientists have the knowledge and skills to deal with current and future challenges and innovations.   It will facilitate knowledge exchange with the wider scientific and research communities, other regulatory bodies (national and international) and government departments, as well as the wider animal health sector.  How to apply  You must make your application via Innovation Facilitator - Civil Service Jobs - GOV.UK where you will find a full job description.  Closing Date  29 September 2025 "
